# App Store Metadata — Today (iOS)

This directory contains localized App Store metadata for fastlane.

## Generated by: Claude (autonomous setup)
## Last updated: 2026-06-03

## Setup steps

### 1. Install fastlane (on Mac with Xcode)

```bash
# Install Ruby + Bundler
brew install ruby
gem install bundler

# In your Today project:
cd /path/to/Today
bundle init
bundle add fastlane
```

### 2. Set up Apple credentials

You need 4 secrets. Get them from https://appstoreconnect.apple.com:

```bash
# Get these from App Store Connect > Users and Access > Keys
export APPLE_TEAM_ID="ABCDE12345"          # Your 10-char Team ID
export APPLE_KEY_ID="ABCD123456"           # Your Key ID
export APPLE_KEY_ISSUER_ID="12345abcd-..." # Issuer ID
export APPLE_KEY_CONTENT="<base64 of .p8>" # base64 -i AuthKey_XXXXX.p8
```

### 3. One-command upload to TestFlight

```bash
cd /path/to/Today
bundle exec fastlane ios beta
```

This will:
1. Build a signed Release IPA
2. Sign with your Developer credentials
3. Upload to TestFlight
4. Notify your internal testers (if configured)

### 4. Submit to App Store review

```bash
bundle exec fastlane ios release
```

This will:
1. Build + sign the IPA
2. Upload to App Store Connect
3. Submit for review
4. Optionally auto-release on approval

## File mapping

| File | App Store Connect field |
|------|-------------------------|
| `name.txt` | App name |
| `subtitle.txt` | Subtitle (30 chars) |
| `description.txt` | Description (4000 chars) |
| `keywords.txt` | Keywords (100 chars) |
| `promotional_text.txt` | Promotional text (170 chars) |
| `release_notes.txt` | What's new (4000 chars) |
| `privacy_url.txt` | Privacy policy URL |
| `support_url.txt` | Support URL |
| `marketing_url.txt` | Marketing URL (optional) |
| `copyright.txt` | Copyright text |
| `primary_category.txt` | Primary category |
| `secondary_category.txt` | Secondary category |
| `screenshots/*.png` | Per-device screenshots |

## Directories

- `en-US/` — English (US) metadata
- `zh-Hans/` — Simplified Chinese metadata
- `review_information/` — App Review contact info
- `screenshots/` — Per-locale, per-device screenshots

## Editing

After running `fastlane ios metadata` once, you can edit files in this directory
and re-run the command to update App Store Connect.
